name: Daily segment health
prompt: Pull Klaviyo segment counts: Active (engaged last 30d), Engaged (opened last 90d), Lapsed (no open 90-180d), VIP (top 10% by LTV via Shopify). Append to outputs/segments.jsonl. Flag any >10% day-over-day swing.

name: Monday VIP audit
prompt: Identify top 10% by lifetime value via Shopify Composio. For any VIP with no order in 60 days, trigger personalised winback in Klaviyo (draft only — Email + SMS Operator approves and sends).

name: Wednesday churn signals
prompt: Find subscribers who opened email in last 30d but haven't ordered in 90d. Tag in Klaviyo as "high-churn-risk". Surface to Email + SMS Operator for next broadcast targeting.

name: Friday referral programme check
prompt: Once referral programme launches (TBC): pull last 7 days of referrals, conversion rate, top referrers. Until then, no-op (output ROUTINE_OK).

name: Sunday cohort report
prompt: Compute Day 0 / 7 / 30 / 60 retention rates by acquisition channel for cohorts that hit those marks this week. Output to outputs/cohorts-{date}.md. Surface biggest mover in Director Mon review.
